title: Arrabidaea triplinervia

The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies for its therapeutic benefits.
